title: TBTeek Closet Light, Super Bright, Battery Operated, Stick Anywhere, Cob Led Light Switch Nightlight, Tap Lights for Closet, Shed, Attic, Emergency (4 Pack)
features: IDEAL BRIGHT: 4 pcs led light switch night light equips with good quality COB led strip. Its brightness can light up the utility rooms, under cabinet, bathroom, outdoor shed, garage, kitchen cabinet/wardrobe/cupboard, night reading, camping, etc.

CONVENIENT USAGE: One push switch controls its power, turn on/off anytime. For its high brightness, it can continuously work for 3-4 hours, so when you do not use them, pls timely turn off it to save power. And easily portable for power outage, to keep the around clearly visible. Great to have on hand for emergencies.
EASY TO INSTALL: Stick up anywhere by adhesive screw sets(included); Stick at any metals’ surface by two magnets(included); Hanging on the screw by small hole on the back.
POWER SOURCE：Power operated by 3x1.5V AAA batteries(Not included). No need to worry about electrical issues when use in the kids’ room.
WHAT YOU GET: 4 pcs of closet light, 1 set of adhesive hook, 1 manual.
description: Product Description ‎TBTeek Closet Light Battery Powered，Lights Up the Dark Space! Next page Wireless Wall Lights battery operated These battery lights are bright enough to light up any dark space at night.
